notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Stephenson reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Brady House. Sal Stewart scores. Matt McLain to 3rd. Will Benson to 2nd. Fielding error by third baseman Brady House.

notableEvents.label: Ke'Bryan Hayes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ke'Bryan Hayes grounds into a double play, shortstop CJ Abrams to second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Luis García Jr. Tyler Stephenson out at 2nd. Ke'Bryan Hayes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ke'Bryan Hayes rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ke'Bryan Hayes grounds into a double play, shortstop CJ Abrams to second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Luis García Jr. Tyler Stephenson out at 2nd. Ke'Bryan Hayes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Stephenson reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Brady House. Sal Stewart scores. Matt McLain to 3rd. Will Benson to 2nd. Fielding error by third baseman Brady House.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Stephenson reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Brady House. Sal Stewart scores. Matt McLain to 3rd. Will Benson to 2nd. Fielding error by third baseman Brady House.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
